{{CargoRelic
|name=Crying Boy
|class_id=20015
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=A piece of work by the painter Giovanni Bragolin. Belief in the painting's curse was widespread since it was frequently found undamaged amidst the ruins of burned houses!
|fame=10
|art=29
|fth=16
|civ=17
|tech=18
|ss1=Soul Offering SPD +0.4%
|ss2=Soul Offering SPD +0.8%
|ss3=Soul Offering SPD +1.2%
|ss4=Soul Offering SPD +1.2%
|ss7=Soul Offering SPD +1.2%<br> (Awakened)
}}
